messages.content: 另外，是否能直接在数值后面直接添加重量单位和测量单位，因为这将使我们更容易快速解释信息。怎么翻译

Additionally, is it possible to directly add weight units and measurement units after the numerical value, as this would make it easier for us to quickly interpret the information. How to translate this depends on the context, but the general idea can be conveyed as: 此外，是否可以在数值后直接添加重量单位和测量单位，这样我们可以更快速地解释信息。

As per my communication with my colleagues in Shanghai, they have checked with Randy and it is confirmed that these 3 vendors are not required to be included in the current PacD project.  Thanks. 怎么回复这封邮件

Dear [Name],

Thank you for your email and the update from your colleagues in Shanghai. I am glad to hear that the status of these 3 vendors has been confirmed and that they are not required to be included in the PacD project. 

Please feel free to get in touch with me if you have any further updates or concerns.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
还有别的回复吗？

如果你想表达更多的感谢或者需要回答一些问题的话，你可以这样回复：

Dear [Name],

Thank you for your email and the update from your colleagues in Shanghai. I am grateful for your team's efforts in confirming the status of these vendors for the PacD project.

Just to confirm, will there be any changes or adjustments to the project timeline or budget now that these vendors will not be included? If there are any updates, please do not hesitate to reach out to me.

Thank you again for your assistance, and please let me know if there is anything else I can do in this regard.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
非常谢谢你跟你的上海同事确认，发邮件给stve

Dear Steve,

I hope this email finds you well. I wanted to update you on the status of the PacD project. As per my recent communication with my colleagues in Shanghai, they have confirmed that the 3 vendors we discussed previously are not required to be included in the project. 

I wanted to thank you for your help in exploring this matter and keeping us informed throughout the process. Your support is greatly appreciated.

Please do not hesitate to contact me if you have any questions or concerns regarding this update.

Thank you again for your assistance.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

As per my communication with my colleagues in Shanghai, they have checked with Randy and it is confirmed that these 3 vendors are not required to be included in the current PacD project.  Thanks. 帮我回复steve

Dear Steve,

I hope you are doing well. I just received an update on the PacD project, and I wanted to let you know that the status of the 3 vendors we have been discussing has been confirmed. Following communication with my colleagues in Shanghai, it has been verified with Randy that these vendors are not required to be included in the current project.

Thank you for your support and assistance in this matter. It has been very helpful to have your input and expertise throughout the process.

Please let me know if you have any further questions or concerns, or if there are any other updates you would like to discuss.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

Thank you for your support and assistance in this matter. Then we won’t to arrange test for these 3 vendors. Thank you.
有没有别的说法

你可以这样回复：

Dear Steve,

You're welcome, and thank you for your prompt response. As per the confirmation from my colleagues in Shanghai, there is no need to proceed with testing these 3 vendors, and we can continue with the project as planned.

If you have any further questions or concerns, please do not hesitate to let me know.

Thanks again for your support and assistance.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

dear steve，Thank you for your support and assistance in this matter. Then we won’t to arrange test for these 3 vendors. Thank you.
发邮件给steve

Dear Steve,

I hope this email finds you well. I wanted to provide you with an update regarding the PacD project. I have received confirmation from my colleagues in Shanghai that the 3 vendors we discussed previously will not be required for the current project. Therefore, we will not need to arrange any tests for these vendors.

Thank you for your support and assistance throughout this process. If you have any further questions or concerns, please do not hesitate to get in touch with me.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

dear steve，Thank you for your support and assistance in this matter. Then we won’t to arrange test for these 3 vendors. Thank you.
是什么意思，有没有更好的说法

这封邮件的意思是确认不需要对这三家供应商进行测试，并感谢Steve在整个过程中提供的帮助和支持。

如果你想用更加专业的说法，你可以这样写：

Dear Steve,

I would like to inform you that, following my recent communication with colleagues in Shanghai, it has been confirmed that the 3 vendors we previously discussed are not required for the current PacD project. Consequently, we will not need to arrange any tests for these vendors.

I wanted to express my gratitude for your continued support and assistance throughout this matter. Your contribution has been greatly appreciated.

Please let me know if there is anything further that you would like to discuss or any other questions you might have.

Thank you again for your help.

Kind regards,
[Your Name]
这个po已经填上了该填写的信息, 并提交了文件作为附件参考，只不过不是compliance的照片，发邮件给tim

Dear Tim,

I hope this email finds you well. I wanted to let you know that I have submitted a document as an attachment for your reference. The document contains all the required information, although the attached photo may not be a compliance photo.

Please let me know if there is anything else you need from me regarding this matter, or if there are any further questions or concerns.

Thank you for your assistance, and I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
由于她们没有足够的服装装满纸箱，所以我正在询问她是否有类似这个po的款式的服装来装满箱子。怎么翻译

Due to them not having enough clothing to fill the boxes, I am currently inquiring with her whether she has similar styles of clothing like this PO to fill the boxes. 

翻译结果：

由于他们没有足够的服装来填满纸箱，所以我正在向她询问是否有类似这份PO中的款式的服装来填充这些纸箱。
